name: Oriental Goose Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 bell peppers (1 red, 1 green - cut into strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the goose breasts and pat dry. Cut them into 1-inch slices and parboil for 20 minutes. Drain and reserve the broth.
2. Sauté the goose, onions, mushrooms, and almonds in a skillet for 15 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste, and add seasoned salt if desired.
3. Prepare the Rice-A-Roni according to package directions, using the reserved broth and adding celery and pepper slices halfway through cooking time.
4. Combine the goose mixture and rice mixture, simmering for 15 minutes before serving.
